title: Chinese Stir-Fry with Potatoes
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired dish featuring stir-fried potatoes and vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 2-3 minutes, until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped potatoes and cook for 5-7 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add the chopped bok choy and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until wilted.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
